# @platform/storage-runtime

Object storage abstraction: file upload interface, presigned URL contracts, and storage bucket policy definitions.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/storage-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: storage-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: storage-service
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed file upload and retrieval interface
- Declare presigned URL generation contracts for client-direct upload flows
- Specify bucket policy and access control semantics
- Decouple all platform and feature packages from specific cloud storage providers

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement cloud storage SDK calls (owned by adapters-object-storage)
- Does not own content delivery or CDN configuration
- Does not validate file content or enforce virus scanning

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by feature packages to request presigned upload URLs
- adapters-object-storage implements the upload interface against AWS S3 or equivalent

```text
application
platform
feature
adapter
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
contract
ui
```


### Consumes APIs

```text
None
```

## Operational notes

- Presigned URLs must have short TTLs — configure per-bucket maximums in the adapter
- Bucket naming must follow the platform naming convention to enable IAM policy automation
